commands: printf '#!/bin/sh\necho preexisting-binary-works' > $VP_HOME/bin/npm-global-preexist-cli && chmod +x $VP_HOME/bin/npm-global-preexist-cli # Create user-owned binary
npm install -g ./npm-global-preexist-pkg # Install pkg that declares same bin name
npm uninstall -g npm-global-preexist-pkg # Should NOT remove the pre-existing binary
